rationale: For an educational CRM designed to handle dense data, leads, and multi-tenant management, the interface needs to project authority, clarity, and precision. Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) provides a highly functional, legible, and objective aesthetic that prioritizes progressive disclosure, information hierarchy, and data visualization without unnecessary decorative distractions.

typography.installation_instructions: Import both fonts via next/font/google in Next.js. Avoid using 'Inter' or 'Space Grotesk'.

spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: The 'Control Room' grid layout. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 or 12-column grid. Tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6). Ensure all widget containers use h-full.
spacing_and_layout.container_padding: p-6 or p-8 inside cards/sections to prevent text collision. Mobile-first padding.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align dense content, tables, and forms. Use optical alignment for buttons with icons.
spacing_and_layout.radius: Minimal. max 6px (rounded-md) across all cards, inputs, and buttons to reinforce the functional/Swiss aesthetic. Avoid pill shapes.

components.cards: Cardless flat design or 1px subtle borders (border-slate-200), pure white backgrounds. No heavy drop shadows. Hover states get slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-sm.
components.tables: Progressive disclosure structure. Show top metrics above table. Use Shadcn Table. Essential columns only (Name, Stage, Source, Next Step, Status). Use a right-side drawer (Sheet) for full Lead details to avoid leaving the page.
components.buttons: Flat solid primary color for main CTA. Outline or Ghost for secondary. Always explicitly define hover text color. Example: hover:bg-blue-700 hover:text-white.
components.forms: Use Shadcn Form, Input, Select. Labels must be bold and concise. Inputs should have subtle 1px borders, active state needs ring-2 ring-blue-300 ring-offset-1.
components.navigation: Sidebar for dashboard navigation with dark theme (bg-slate-900, text-slate-300). Active states use bright blue indicator and white text.

motion.hover_states: Quick, functional transitions. transition-colors duration-150 ease-in-out.
motion.entrance: Staggered fade-up for table rows or dashboard cards. Minimal, non-distracting.

auth_background.description: Abstract geometric composition representing data flow and education.
auth_background.usage: Use as the split-screen image or background on the Login/Registration/Auth pages.

landing_hero_campus.usage: Use in the marketing/landing page hero section or About section.

team_advisor_meeting.usage: Use in the 'Features' or 'Target Audience' section of the landing page to illustrate counselors working.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color hex codes provided. Do NOT use default Tailwind colors blindly unless mapped to the palette.
Build the dashboard using a layout with a fixed sidebar (dark mode sidebar) and a light content area.
Implement multi-tenant logic abstractly in the UI (e.g., Organization switcher dropdown in the header/sidebar).

For the Lead Management table, implement progressive disclosure: a main table with key columns, and clicking a row opens a Shadcn Sheet (Right Drawer) with full lead details, follow-up notes, and activity timeline.
Add 'data-testid' to ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, menu items, table rows) using kebab-case and role-based naming (e.g., data-testid="lead-table-row", data-testid="add-lead-submit").
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing/landing pages for creative freedom, but use Shadcn UI strictly for the dashboard, CRM tables, and settings forms.
Do not use generic font Inter for headings; stick to Outfit for headings and IBM Plex Sans for body.
Use Next.js 15 App router. Make the components client/server aware appropriately.
